ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company belongs to */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  "revenue_range" TEXT /* Revenue range of the company (e.g., Fortune 500, Fortune 1000) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial metric */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the metric belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the financial metric (e.g., Revenue, EBITDA, Net Income) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of financial metric (e.g., revenue, profitability, assets) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial metric */,
  "calculation_formula" TEXT /* Calculation formula for the financial metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the financial metric (e.g., Thousands, USD) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the financial metric (e.g., quarterly, annually) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_metrics_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_metrics_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES financial_metric_types ("type")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial data point */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial metric the data point belongs to */,
  "period" TEXT /* Financial period the data point represents (e.g., TTM 31-Mar-2023, FY 2022 31-Dec-2022) */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Financial value for the data point */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the financial value (e.g., Thousands, USD) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for the financial data point */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES financial_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., financial analyst, data analyst, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role that the permission belongs to */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who has the permission */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission granted to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_metric_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial metric type */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of financial metric (e.g., revenue, profitability, assets) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial metric type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)
